free_text: S-32 levels observed in the reactions P-31(P,A0)Si-28
and Si-28(A,G)S-32.
4 MV accelerator with magnet at 90
degrees.
Four surface-barrier detectors were used for
alpha particles measurements.
Two detectors of NaI(Tl) were used for
gamma rays measurement. Their sizes were 12.7 cm *
12.7 cm. They were protected from external radiation
by lead cylinder of 5 cm thickness. One detector was
placed at the distance of 3 cm from the sample.
Another detector was fixed in horizontal plane at 90
degree angle to the beam direction or placed at the
distance from 3 cm up to 20 cm from the target.
REACTION code in Sub 003,006 was changed,
COMMON in Sub 003,006 was added, ERR-ANALYS in Sub 004,
005 was changed.
In sub 002, 007 DATA-ERR1 was replaced by
DATA-ERR. DETECTOR was corrected. Data in sub 006 were
redigitized. Data presentation in sub 007 was changed.
Data are given as counts per 500 microsec.
Enriched target of 28Si was used. It was prepared by
evaporation. The density of target is 8 mu-g/cm**2.

technique. The density of target is 6 mu-g/cm2.
